clause.author: Kieran O'Donnell
clause.title: Landing area
clause.p: An entrance door that is subject to Clause 2.1must have a space of at least 1200 mm x 1200 mm on the external (arrival) side of the door that is—

ol.li: unobstructed (other than by a gate or a screen door); and
level, or has a gradient not steeper than 1:40 if a gradient is necessary to allow for drainage.
Clause 2.3 only applies to a Class 1a building.
Clause 2.3 does not apply to a dwelling that is exempt from compliance with Clause 1.1.
Clause 2.3 does not apply to an entrance door that serves an appurtenant Class 10a garage or carport in accordance with Clause 1.1(1)(b).

callout.title: Entrance doors to Class 2 sole-occupancy units
callout.p: Requirements for landing areas outside the entrance door to a Class 2 sole-occupancy unit located on an accessible floor are set out in Section D of NCC Volume One and the Disability (Access to Premises — Buildings) Standards 2010.
